positive: Stylized vector illustration of a majestic cosmic nebula intertwined with bioluminescent floral elements and celestial constellations. Central composition focusing on a large, detailed celestial flower with glowing petals (iridescence, gradient colors) radiating outward. The overall style must be graphic, clean silhouette, highly contrasted linework, and modern psychedelic art suitable for apparel. Deep indigo background with vibrant teal, gold leaf, and magenta accents. Minimal gradients, high detail, high contrast, symmetric arrangement, flat design aesthetic.
